articles.title: CHARACTER AI TESTS GAMES ON THE WEB
articles.summary: AI startup Character AI is experimenting with integrating gaming experiences on its platform, blending interactive AI personalities with casual games.

articles.title: GOOGLE.ORG GENERATIVE AI ACCELERATOR 2025
articles.summary: Google.org has launched a Generative AI Accelerator to support innovative projects addressing global challenges using artificial intelligence.

articles.title: AMAZON PAUSES US DRONE DELIVERIES
articles.summary: Amazon has temporarily halted its drone delivery operations in the US, citing challenges in scaling and regulatory hurdles.

articles.title: TIKTOK RECOMMENDATION ALGORITHM
articles.summary: While this paper is slightly old, it is still the foundation on which much of the TikTok algorithm is built. The researchers built a collisionless embedding table, which helps for research on features to keep them unique.

articles.title: DEPTH FOUNDATION MODEL
articles.summary: This study incorporates a robust monocular relative depth model into the recurrent stereo-matching framework, building a new framework for depth foundation model-based stereo-matching.

articles.title: AERIAL DETECTION
articles.summary: This repo is a technical practice to fine-tune large multimodal language models for oriented object detection.

articles.title: SELF ADAPTIVE LANGUAGE MODELS
articles.summary: Sakana AI has released research and code for training language models that are adaptive during test time. This means that they can perform weight updates and learn while being run at inference.

articles.title: EASY DICTIONARY LEARNING
articles.summary: There are many powerful toolkits for training SAEs. This particular one is the simplest and most hackable implementation out there for now. It has sensible baselines that lead to good performance.

articles.title: WATERMARKING FRAMEWORK
articles.summary: Neural Honeytrace (NeurHT) is a robust plug-and-play watermarking framework against model extraction attacks.

articles.title: SAMSUNG SPREADS VISION AI ACROSS ITS 2025 TV PORTFOLIO
articles.summary: Samsung's 2025 TV lineup introduces Vision AI, which enhances sound and picture quality, and smart features like Click to Search and Samsung Food. New models include Neo QLED 8K TVs with the Wireless One Connect Box and OLED TVs with upgraded AI processors and Glare-Free technology.

articles.title: WHY CONTEXT-AWARE AI AGENTS WILL GIVE US SUPERPOWERS IN 2025
articles.summary: In 2025, tech giants will shift from selling tools to offering enhanced human abilities through "augmented mentality," leveraging AI, AR, and conversational computing. By 2030, context-aware AI in wearable devices will provide superhuman capabilities, anticipating users' needs and integrating seamlessly into daily life. Companies like Meta and Google are positioned to lead this transformation, though careful regulation is necessary to prevent misuse and ensure responsible deployment.

articles.title: AVATAAR RELEASES NEW TOOL TO CREATE AI-GENERATED VIDEOS FOR PRODUCTS
articles.summary: Avataar has launched Velocity, an AI tool for generating product videos from links that targets brands who can't afford traditional video budgets, with backing from Peak XV and Tiger Global. Clients like HP and Victoria's Secret are already using the tool. Avataar differentiates through its data from 3D models, ensuring no glitches in videos, aiming to drive better conversion rates.

articles.title: THIS COMPANY COMBINED DISNEY-LEVEL IP & NEXT-GEN VR TECH (48 HOURS LEFT FOR A 15% BONUS)
articles.summary: Elf Labs, winner of 100+ historic trademarks is revolutionizing IP with patented AR/VR technology. They're now providing one last chance

HP UNVEILS A RANGE OF AI DESKTOPS AND LAPTOPS AT AMD/INTEL EVENTS AT CES
articles.summary: HP has launched new AI-powered PCs featuring advanced AI processors optimized for demanding tasks, including the EliteBook Ultra G1i and Z2 Mini G1a Workstation Desktop, at CES 2025.

articles.title: MEETKAI PROVIDES AI FOR SMART GLASSES WITH EMBEDDED OS
articles.summary: MeetKai is launching an AI-based OS for smart glasses, marking its first entry into hardware.

articles.title: UK USES AI TO TACKLE 'BID-RIGGING' COLLUSION IN PUBLIC PROCUREMENT CONTRACTS
articles.summary: The U.K.'s CMA is using AI to tackle bid-rigging in public procurement by analyzing data for collusive bidding practices.
